__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — frozen citation, not live data

claim.condition: alpha+beta to all-beta at heating; alloy-dependent; ATI / Timet / ATI ATI Specialty Alloys datasheets agree

source.primary: ASM Handbook vol. 2 — Properties and Selection: Nonferrous Alloys and Special-Purpose Materials (1990)
source.vendor_secondary: ATI Specialty Alloys Ti-6Al-4V datasheet; Timet 6Al-4V grade sheet

tolerance.basis: ASM vol. 2 published spread ± 15 C reflecting interstitial O/N variation
